name: Mushroom Cheese Stromboli
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, sauté mushrooms in butter until tender. Set aside.
2. On a lightly floured board, roll dough into a 30x8-inch rectangle. Cut into two 16x8-inch pieces.
3. On the long side of each piece, layer pepperoni, cheeses, mushrooms, spaghetti sauce, parsley and oregano.
4. Fold over dough and pinch to seal.
5. Combine egg and water. Brush over edges and ends of dough.
6. With a sharp knife, cut five small steam vents in the top of each roll.
7. Place on greased baking sheets. Sprinkle with Parmesan if desired.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 27-30 minutes until golden brown. Slice and serve warm.
